phoneticUs: 藞蕣ru藧蕛i藢蓴l; 蕣藞ru藧蕛i藢蓴l; 蕣ru藧蕛i藢o蕣l
examples: Isoamyl acetate was synthesized by urushiol resin immobilized ferric trichloride catalyst in this paper.
Abstract Fpoxy modified urushiol-furfural resin based on the modification of Chinese lacquer has been studied.
Lacquer is excised from the lacquer natural SAP, which is mainly composed of urushiol, laccase, tree resin and water.
